title: Section 30
content: (1) Any Registrar may in his discretion receive and register any document which might be registered by any Sub-Registrar subordinate to him. 1* * * * * STATE AMENDMENT Karnataka Amendment of section 30.--In Section 30 of the Registration Act, 1908 (Central Amendment 16 of 1908) (hereinafter referred to as the principal Act), the brackets and figure (1) and 'sub-section (2)' shall be omitted.] [Vide Karnataka Act 24 of 1989, s. 2] Orissa Amendment of section 30.--In the Registration Act, 1908 (16 of 1908) (hereinafter referred to as the principal Act), in section 30, sub-section (2) shall be omitted. [Vide Orissa Act 19 of 1991, s. 2] Haryana Amendment of section 30 of Central Act 16 of 1908.--Sub-section (2) of section 30 of the Registration Act, 1908 (hereinafter referred to as the principal Act), shall be omitted. [Vide Haryana Act 4 of 1997, s. 2]
footnote: 1. Sub-section (2) omitted by Act 48 of 2001, s. 4 (w.e.f. 24-9-2001).
